title: bidens aristosa f. involucrata
intro: Bidens aristosa f. involucrata, also known as cleft-leaf beggar-ticks, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Bidens aristosa plant, belonging to the aster family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens aristosa f. involucrata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
